claim_boundary: Phase 14 creates bounded review suggestions only. It does not claim production monitoring, content validation, contradiction detection, causal inference, prediction, alert readiness, autonomous action, or truth resolution.
phase14_goal: Create practical, bounded review suggestions from analytical-core outputs without making truth, causality, prediction, alert, policy, financial, legal, medical, or autonomous-action claims.
purpose: Convert bounded pattern, negative-space, math, and secondary-condition candidates into review-only scenario suggestions.
